identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Design a world-class, mission-driven Astrology AI platform with a dark cosmic aesthetic.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Luxury Fashion with NASA precision.
Emotion First: Every pixel must convey 'Truth' and 'Mystery'.
Content is King: Data is the art. Charts are the hero.
Zoom In: Focus on the details of the chart.
Negative Space: Let the stars breathe.

usage.headings: font-serif (Cinzel) - Use for H1, H2, Hero text. Tracking-tight.
usage.body: font-sans (Manrope) - Use for all standard text, descriptions, chat.
usage.data: font-mono (JetBrains Mono) - Use for planetary degrees, time, coordinates.

colors.palette_description: Cosmic Luxury. Deep obsidian backgrounds, starlight white text, and mystic gold accents.

layout.spacing_system: Generous. Use p-8, p-12, p-24. Avoid cramped layouts.

grid_system.marketing: Tetris Grid (Mode A). Asymmetrical, overlapping elements.
grid_system.dashboard: Bento Grid (Mode B). High density, gap-4, 100% height utilization.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.3)] transition-all duration-300

visual_enhancers.gradients: Use subtle radial gradients for spotlights. No linear gradients for backgrounds.
effects: Noise overlay (opacity 0.03) on all solid backgrounds
1px border with 10% opacity for all cards
visual_enhancers.animations: Framer Motion. Smooth fade-ins (duration 0.6s). Staggered children.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts link to public/index.html immediately.
2. SETUP THEME: Update src/index.css with the provided CSS variables for the 'Cosmic Luxury' palette.
3. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to extend the font family (Cinzel, Manrope) and colors.
4. BUILD LAYOUTS: Use the 'Tetris' grid for the Landing Page and 'Bento' grid for the Dashboard.
5. USE SHADCN: Use Shadcn components but OVERRIDE the default styles with the provided 'glass_card' and 'primary' button styles.
6. IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs. Do not use placeholders.
7. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
